callback_source_binding.controlling_source_fact: Callback was placed to +1-713-555-0196, which is the submitted_contact_phone FROM portal_change_record PORTAL-CHG-9A4B1. Per policy, callback contact source must be pre-existing vendor-master data rather than a number supplied in the change request. The pre-change vendor-master snapshot (VM-SNAP-V-SDS-5829-20240901) shows phone_on_file as +1-713-555-0148. The callback should have been to the pre-change vendor-master phone, not the newly supplied portal-change contact number.

VM-SNAP-V-BTP-9144-20241104 with phone_on_file +1-614-555-0126 predating portal change"},"blocked_inferences":["Portal change record PORTAL-CHG-7K2Q9 does not govern callback source number_source field: 'vendor_master_snapshot: VM-SNAP-V-BTP-9144-20241104'","VM-SNAP-V-BTP-9144-20241104 snapshot_date: 2024-11-04, snapshot_source: 'vendor master export', phone_on_file: '+1-614-555-0126'","VM-SNAP-V-BTP-9144-20241104 predates PORTAL-CHG-7K2Q9 submission_timestamp 2024-11-04T13:29:40Z","AP-SIGNOFF-BTP-5540 signed by Lena Cho (AP-1842) and David Okafor (AP-0927) on 2024-11-06","VM-AUDIT-BTP-63D2 audit_timestamp 2024-11-07T09:28:36Z confirms vendor_master_update effective","IPR-BTP-4421 check_timestamp 2024-11-22T18:29:11Z confirms invoice cross-reference complete","VM-HOLD-BTP-2024-11 hold_released_at 2024-11-22T18:37:52Z confirms temporary hold release","PORTAL-CHG-7K2Q9 submitted_billing_contact_email 'receivables@bluetimber-pumps.co' is newly supplied contact, not callback source","ESR-BTP-2024-11 disposition_code: 'ROUTED_FOR_STANDARD_PAYMENT_REVIEW' indicates elevated scrutiny disposition complete"],"open_blockers":[],"reasoning":"The callback record CALLSYS-771904 establishes number_source as 'vendor_master_snapshot: VM-SNAP-V-BTP-9144-20241104'. This is a pre-change vendor master snapshot extracted on 2024-11-04, predating the portal change submission (2024-11-04T13:29:40Z). The policy requires callback contact source to be pre-existing vendor-master data rather than a number supplied in the change request, invoice, or newly submitted contact record. The portal change record (PORTAL-CHG-7K2Q9) submitted a new billing contact email (receivables@bluetimber-pumps.co) and is correctly classified as a NONCOMPLIANT_NEWLY_SUPPLIED_SOURCE if it were the callback source—it is not. The callback used the pre-change snapshot phone (+1-614-555-0126) which is confirmed in VM-SNAP-V-BTP-9144-20241104. Required controls are closed: two-person AP signoff (AP-SIGNOFF-BTP-5540), vendor-master audit log (VM-AUDIT-BTP-63D2), invoice cross-reference (IPR-BTP-4421), and hold release (VM-HOLD-BTP-2024-11). The ESCALATE gate does not trigger because the callback source is COMPLIANT_PRECHANGE_VENDOR_MASTER, not any of the newly supplied source categories. Elevated scrutiny conditions and portal-change context are present in the packet but are downstream factors; they do not override the controlling callback source fact that the phone contacted was from the pre-change vendor master snapshot."}

parsed_json.reasoning: The callback record CALLSYS-771904 establishes number_source as 'vendor_master_snapshot: VM-SNAP-V-BTP-9144-20241104'. This is a pre-change vendor master snapshot extracted on 2024-11-04, predating the portal change submission (2024-11-04T13:29:40Z). The policy requires callback contact source to be pre-existing vendor-master data rather than a number supplied in the change request, invoice, or newly submitted contact record. The portal change record (PORTAL-CHG-7K2Q9) submitted a new billing contact email (receivables@bluetimber-pumps.co) and is correctly classified as a NONCOMPLIANT_NEWLY_SUPPLIED_SOURCE if it were the callback source—it is not. The callback used the pre-change snapshot phone (+1-614-555-0126) which is confirmed in VM-SNAP-V-BTP-9144-20241104. Required controls are closed: two-person AP signoff (AP-SIGNOFF-BTP-5540), vendor-master audit log (VM-AUDIT-BTP-63D2), invoice cross-reference (IPR-BTP-4421), and hold release (VM-HOLD-BTP-2024-11). The ESCALATE gate does not trigger because the callback source is COMPLIANT_PRECHANGE_VENDOR_MASTER, not any of the newly supplied source categories. Elevated scrutiny conditions and portal-change context are present in the packet but are downstream factors; they do not override the controlling callback source fact that the phone contacted was from the pre-change vendor master snapshot.
